nasb.text: He brought us out from there in order to bring us in, to give us the land which He had sworn to our fathers.’

esv.text: And he brought us out from there, that he might bring us in and give us the land that he swore to give to our fathers.

cnv.text: 卻把我們從那裡領出來，為要領我們進入他向我們列祖起誓應許的地，要把這地賜給我們。

ccb.text: 祂带领我们离开埃及，为要把我们带进祂起誓赐给我们祖先的这片土地。
